003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020
021import java.util.*;
022
023import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
024import org.apache.juneau.marshall.encoders.*;
025import org.apache.juneau.marshall.httppart.*;
026import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.arg.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.converter.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.guard.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.logger.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.openapi.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.processor.*;
033import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.staticfile.*;
034import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.swagger.*;
035
036/**
037 * Shared abstract base for the {@link RestBuilder}flavor builders ({@code RestServlet.Builder},
038 * {@code RestResource.Builder}, {@code RestMixin.Builder}).
039 *
040 * <p>
041 * Each fluent {@code @Rest}-member setter is implemented <b>once</b> here and forwards into a backing
042 * {@code RestAnnotation.Builder} &mdash; the override bag.  At {@link RestContext} construction time the bag is
043 * turned into a synthetic, highest-priority {@code @Rest} annotation that is prepended to the resource's
044 * {@code @Rest} chain, so builder-supplied values <b>take precedence</b> over the class's own
045 * {@link Rest @Rest} annotation values.
046 *
047 * <h5 class='section'>Self type (CRTP):</h5>
048 *
049 * <p>
050 * {@code SELF} is the concrete builder type, left open through the flavor builders and their user subclasses so
051 * that bespoke setters on a subclass chain with true covariant returns.  Setters return {@link #self()}.
052 *
053 * @param <R> The resource type produced by {@link #build()}.
054 * @param <SELF> The concrete builder type (self type).
055 * @since 10.0.0
056 */
057@SuppressWarnings({
058   "unchecked", // CRTP self-type cast in self() is safe by construction.
059   "java:S1452", // Wildcard return on getResourceType() is intentional.
060   "java:S119" // 'SELF' (CRTP self-type) is intentional and clearer than a single-letter name.
061})
062public abstract class AbstractRestBuilder<R, SELF extends AbstractRestBuilder<R, SELF>> implements RestBuilder<SELF> {
063
064   private final Class<R> resourceType;
065   private final RestAnnotation.Builder anno = RestAnnotation.create();
066   private final Map<String,Object> extras = new LinkedHashMap<>();
067   private Boolean mdcAsyncPropagation;
068
069   /**
070    * Constructor.
071    *
072    * @param resourceType The resource type produced by {@link #build()}.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
073    */
074   protected AbstractRestBuilder(Class<R> resourceType) {
075      this.resourceType = assertArgNotNull("resourceType", resourceType);
076   }
077
078   /**
079    * Returns this builder cast to the self type.
080    *
081    * @return This object.
082    */
083   protected final SELF self() {
084      return (SELF)this;
085   }
086
087   /**
088    * Builds the configured resource instance.
089    *
090    * @return A new resource instance configured by this builder.
091    */
092   public abstract R build();
093
094   /**
095    * Reflectively instantiates the resource type, preferring a {@code (RestBuilder<?>)} constructor (constructor
096    * injection) and falling back to the no-arg constructor.
097    *
098    * <p>
099    * Flavor builder {@code build()} implementations call this then stash {@code this} on the returned instance.
100    *
101    * @return A new, uninitialized resource instance.
102    */
103   protected R createResource() {
104      var ci = ClassInfo.of(resourceType);
105      var ctor = ci.getDeclaredConstructor(x -> x.hasParameterTypes(RestBuilder.class)).orElse(null);
106      if (ctor != null)
107         return ctor.accessible().newInstance(this);
108      var noArg = ci.getNoArgConstructor(Visibility.PRIVATE)
109         .orElseThrow(() -> new IllegalStateException("Resource class " + resourceType.getName() + " has no no-arg or RestBuilder<?> constructor."));
110      return noArg.accessible().newInstance();
111   }
112
113   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
114   // Override-bag accessors (consumed by RestContext during construction)
115   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
116
117   /**
118    * Returns the resource type produced by this builder.
119    *
120    * @return The resource type.  Never <jk>null</jk>.
121    */
122   public Class<?> getResourceType() {
123      return resourceType;
124   }
125
126   /**
127    * Returns the synthetic {@code @Rest} annotation carrying all builder-set members, for use as the
128    * highest-priority contributor of the {@code @Rest} resolution chain.
129    *
130    * @return The synthetic annotation.  Never <jk>null</jk>.
131    */
132   public Rest toRestAnnotation() {
133      return anno.build();
134   }
135
136   /**
137    * Returns the programmatic MDC async-propagation override, or <jk>null</jk> if not set.
138    *
139    * @return The override, or <jk>null</jk>.
140    */
141   public Boolean getMdcAsyncPropagation() {
142      return mdcAsyncPropagation;
143   }
144
145   /**
146    * Returns the forward-compat extras set via {@link #set(String, Object)}.
147    *
148    * @return An unmodifiable view of the extras map.  Never <jk>null</jk>.
149    */
150   public Map<String,Object> getExtras() {
151      return Collections.unmodifiableMap(extras);
152   }
153
154   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
155   // Identity & mounting
156   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
157
158   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
159   public SELF path(String value) { anno.path(value); return self(); }
160
161   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
162   public SELF paths(String... value) { anno.paths(value); return self(); }
163
164   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
165   public SELF children(Class<?>... value) { anno.children(value); return self(); }
166
167   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
168   public SELF mixins(Class<?>... value) { anno.mixins(value); return self(); }
169
170   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
171   public SELF mixinDefs(Mixin... value) { anno.mixinDefs(value); return self(); }
172
173   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
174   public SELF uriAuthority(String value) { anno.uriAuthority(value); return self(); }
175
176   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
177   public SELF uriContext(String value) { anno.uriContext(value); return self(); }
178
179   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
180   public SELF uriRelativity(String value) { anno.uriRelativity(value); return self(); }
181
182   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
183   public SELF uriResolution(String value) { anno.uriResolution(value); return self(); }
184
185   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
186   // Marshalling
187   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
188
189   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
190   public SELF serializers(Class<? extends Serializer>... value) { anno.serializers(value); return self(); }
191
192   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
193   public SELF parsers(Class<?>... value) { anno.parsers(value); return self(); }
194
195   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
196   public SELF encoders(Class<? extends Encoder>... value) { anno.encoders(value); return self(); }
197
198   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
199   public SELF partSerializer(Class<? extends HttpPartSerializer> value) { anno.partSerializer(value); return self(); }
200
201   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
202   public SELF partParser(Class<? extends HttpPartParser> value) { anno.partParser(value); return self(); }
203
204   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
205   public SELF consumes(String... value) { anno.consumes(value); return self(); }
206
207   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
208   public SELF produces(String... value) { anno.produces(value); return self(); }
209
210   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
211   public SELF responseProcessors(Class<? extends ResponseProcessor>... value) { anno.responseProcessors(value); return self(); }
212
213   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
214   public SELF allowedSerializerOptions(String... value) { anno.allowedSerializerOptions(value); return self(); }
215
216   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
217   public SELF allowedParserOptions(String... value) { anno.allowedParserOptions(value); return self(); }
218
219   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
220   // Request behavior
221   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
222
223   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
224   public SELF allowedHeaderParams(String value) { anno.allowedHeaderParams(value); return self(); }
225
226   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
227   public SELF allowedMethodHeaders(String value) { anno.allowedMethodHeaders(value); return self(); }
228
229   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
230   public SELF allowedMethodParams(String value) { anno.allowedMethodParams(value); return self(); }
231
232   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
233   public SELF clientVersionHeader(String value) { anno.clientVersionHeader(value); return self(); }
234
235   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
236   public SELF defaultAccept(String value) { anno.defaultAccept(value); return self(); }
237
238   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
239   public SELF defaultContentType(String value) { anno.defaultContentType(value); return self(); }
240
241   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
242   public SELF defaultCharset(String value) { anno.defaultCharset(value); return self(); }
243
244   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
245   public SELF defaultRequestAttributes(String... value) { anno.defaultRequestAttributes(value); return self(); }
246
247   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
248   public SELF defaultRequestHeaders(String... value) { anno.defaultRequestHeaders(value); return self(); }
249
250   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
251   public SELF defaultResponseHeaders(String... value) { anno.defaultResponseHeaders(value); return self(); }
252
253   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
254   public SELF disableContentParam(String value) { anno.disableContentParam(value); return self(); }
255
256   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
257   public SELF maxInput(String value) { anno.maxInput(value); return self(); }
258
259   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
260   public SELF restOpArgs(Class<? extends RestOpArg>... value) { anno.restOpArgs(value); return self(); }
261
262   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
263   // Security
264   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
265
266   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
267   public SELF guards(Class<? extends RestGuard>... value) { anno.guards(value); return self(); }
268
269   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
270   public SELF roleGuard(String value) { anno.roleGuard(value); return self(); }
271
272   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
273   public SELF rolesDeclared(String value) { anno.rolesDeclared(value); return self(); }
274
275   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
276   public SELF converters(Class<? extends RestConverter>... value) { anno.converters(value); return self(); }
277
278   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
279   // Lifecycle / perf
280   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
281
282   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
283   public SELF eagerInit(String value) { anno.eagerInit(value); return self(); }
284
285   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
286   public SELF lazyChildren(String value) { anno.lazyChildren(value); return self(); }
287
288   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
289   public SELF virtualThreads(String value) { anno.virtualThreads(value); return self(); }
290
291   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
292   public SELF asyncTimeoutMillis(String value) { anno.asyncTimeoutMillis(value); return self(); }
293
294   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
295   public SELF asyncCompletionExecutor(String value) { anno.asyncCompletionExecutor(value); return self(); }
296
297   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
298   // Observability / logging / errors
299   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
300
301   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
302   public SELF callLogger(Class<? extends CallLogger> value) { anno.callLogger(value); return self(); }
303
304   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
305   public SELF debug(String value) { anno.debug(value); return self(); }
306
307   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
308   public SELF observability(String value) { anno.observability(value); return self(); }
309
310   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
311   public SELF renderResponseStackTraces(String value) { anno.renderResponseStackTraces(value); return self(); }
312
313   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
314   public SELF problemDetails(String value) { anno.problemDetails(value); return self(); }
315
316   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
317   // Docs / metadata / i18n / static files
318   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
319
320   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
321   public SELF title(String... value) { anno.title(value); return self(); }
322
323   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
324   public SELF description(String... value) { anno.description(value); return self(); }
325
326   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
327   public SELF siteName(String value) { anno.siteName(value); return self(); }
328
329   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
330   public SELF swaggerProvider(Class<? extends SwaggerProvider> value) { anno.swaggerProvider(value); return self(); }
331
332   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
333   public SELF openApiProvider(Class<? extends OpenApiProvider> value) { anno.openApiProvider(value); return self(); }
334
335   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
336   public SELF messages(String value) { anno.messages(value); return self(); }
337
338   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
339   public SELF config(String value) { anno.config(value); return self(); }
340
341   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
342   public SELF staticFiles(Class<? extends StaticFiles> value) { anno.staticFiles(value); return self(); }
343
344   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
345   public SELF noInherit(String... value) { anno.noInherit(value); return self(); }
346
347   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
348   // Programmatic-only knob & escape hatch
349   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
350
351   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
352   public SELF mdcAsyncPropagation(boolean value) { mdcAsyncPropagation = value; return self(); }
353
354   @Override /* RestBuilder<?> */
355   public SELF set(String key, Object value) { extras.put(assertArgNotNull("key", key), value); return self(); }
356}
